title: The Zuckerberg Files | Center for Information Policy Research
text:
# The Zuckerberg Files

[](https://cipr.uwm.edu/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/zuckerbergfilesbanner.jpg) CIPR director, Michael Zimmer, maintains **[The Zuckerberg Files](http://zuckerbergfiles.org/)** , a digital archive of all public utterances of Facebook’s founder and CEO, Mark Zuckerberg. It includes transcripts and bibliographic data of all publicly-available content representing the voice and words of Zuckerberg, including blog posts, letters to shareholders, media interviews, public appearances and product presentations, and quotes in other sources. **  
**

**The Zuckerberg Files** is [hosted](http://dc.uwm.edu/zuckerberg_files/) on the [University of Wisconsin Milwaukee’s Digital Commons](http://dc.uwm.edu/) , and consists of two digital collections. The “ [Transcripts](http://dc.uwm.edu/zuckerberg_files_transcripts) ” collection include full-text transcriptions of all the content in the digital archive of Zuckerberg’s public statements. The “ [Videos](http://dc.uwm.edu/zuckerberg_files_videos) ” collection represents a subset of the collection with archived copies available video files documenting certain Zuckerberg appearances.

Full details are at the [project’s website](http://zuckerbergfiles.org/) .
